title: Add native_sim L2 loopback packet-path test
description: Why this exists: the active Zephyr module now builds and boots LICHEN_L2 on native_sim with the loopback LoRa driver, but we still need an automated packet-path proof. What needs to be done: add a native_sim or ztest harness that sends an IPv6/UDP/CoAP packet through the LICHEN_L2 TX path, loops it through the LoRa loopback driver, verifies LICHEN link frame handling/SCHC decompression on RX, and confirms the packet reaches the Zephyr IPv6 stack or a test observer. Acceptance criteria: the test runs in CI/Linux with CONFIG_LICHEN_L2=y, fails if framing/compression/RX injection is bypassed, and documents any native_sim TAP/zeth requirements.
notes: MVP workflow overlay: use subagents liberally for test design and Zephyr/native_sim diagnosis. Any code creation or modification under this Bead requires three independent codereview subagent passes before closure; record findings in Beads notes or follow-up Beads.
